name: claude-code-bridge
description: Bridge Codex to local Claude Code for planning, review, and delegated rescue work.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate planning, review, and rescue work from Codex to Claude Code
interface.longDescription: Claude Code Bridge lets Codex invoke local Claude Code for architecture planning, code review, adversarial review, and explicitly write-enabled delegated tasks while keeping plan and review commands read-only.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude to plan this architecture
Ask Claude to review my current changes
Ask Claude to fix this issue
